debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
R : Type u_2
mα : MeasurableSpace α
mR : MeasurableSpace R
inst✝⁶ : Nonempty α
inst✝⁵ : StandardBorelSpace α
inst✝⁴ : DecidableEq α
inst✝³ : Countable α
inst✝² : StandardBorelSpace R
inst✝¹ : Nonempty R
alg : Algorithm α R
ν : Kernel α R
inst✝ : IsMarkovKernel ν
n : ℕ
⊢ IndepFun (fun ω => ω.1 (n + 1)) (fun x => @Bandits.ArrayModel.hist α R mα mR inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴ alg x n)
    (@Bandits.ArrayModel.arrayMeasure α R mα mR ν)

failed_attempts:
let trunc (u : ℕ → I) : ℕ → I := fun k ↦ if k ≤ n then u k else 0
  have h_meas_trunc : Measurable trunc := measurable_pi_lambda _ fun i ↦
    Measurable.ite (measurable_const) (measurable_pi_apply i) measurable_const
  have h_eq : ∀ ω, hist alg ω n = hist alg (trunc ω.1, ω.2) n := by
    intro ω
    funext i
    induction n generalizing i with
    | zero => simp [hist, trunc]
    | succ n ih =>
      rw [hist_add_one, hist_add_one]
      congr 1
      · exact ih _
      · rw [ih]
        congr 1
        simp only [trunc, Nat.not_succ_le_self, ↓reduceIte]
        congr 1
        simp only [Nat.succ_le_succ_iff, le_refl, ↓reduceIte]
  have h_indep : IndepFun (fun ω ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)) (fun ω ↦ (trunc ω.1, ω.2)) (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    rw [indepFun_iff_map_prod_eq_prod_map_map measurable_id.fst (h_meas_trunc.fst.prod_mk measurable_id.snd)]
    let μ1 := Measure.infinitePi (fun _ : ℕ ↦ (volume : Measure I))
    let μ2 := Bandit.streamMeasure (α := α) (R := R) ν
    have h_map_μ1 : (μ1.map fun u ↦ (u (n + 1), trunc u)) =
        (μ1.map fun u ↦ u (n + 1)).prod (μ1.map trunc) := by
      refine (iIndepFun_infinitePi (fun _ ↦ volume) _).indepFun_prod_map (t := {n + 1}) (s := Iic n)
        (by simp) (fun u ↦ u (n + 1)) trunc ?_ ?_
      · exact measurable_pi_apply _
      · exact h_meas_trunc
      · intro u
        ext k
        simp only [trunc, Set.mem_Iic]
        split_ifs with h
        · rfl
        · simp
    rw [arrayMeasure, Measure.map_prod_map]
    · rw [h_map_μ1, Measure.prod_assoc]
      congr 1
      rw [Measure.map_prod_map]
      · simp
      · exact h_meas_trunc
      · exact measurable_id
    · exact measurable_id.prod_mk h_meas_trunc
    · exact measurable_id
  exact h_indep.comp measurable_id (measurable_hist alg n) |>.congr rfl h_eq
